build.buildCommand: npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ] && [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "Missing DATABASE_URL in runtime env"; env | cut -d= -f1 | sort; exit 1; fi; npx prisma db push --skip-generate && node dist/index.js'
